_doc: FACTS (sourced, verifiable): nation, position, debutYear, club membership.
EDITORIAL (VerveQ's own, unverified): rating, fameRank, which <=3 clubs are listed, tag/displayCode/fullName.
Every source ref is a resolvable Wikidata (CC0) statement: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/<qid>.
